title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.40.2 to 1.41.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.40.2 to 1.41.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.41.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.140.0 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1222
  • overlay: unix.SYS_PAUSE is not defined on aarch64 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1223
  • Change default location for storage.conf to... by @​dfr in containers/storage#1221
  • pkg/chrootarchive: move NSS load to chrootarchive package by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1228
  • Add freebsd to the local-cross build target by @​dfr in containers/storage#1231
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.2 to 1.15.3 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1230
  • store: skip template copy with layer in different store by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1233
  • overlay: do not check for idmapped mounts if euid!=0 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1234
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.3 to 1.15.4 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1235
  • chunked: recalculate correctly the chunks to request by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1236

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.40.0...v1.41.0

Commits
  • 968b485 Bump to v1.41.0
  • 1ec5cc8 Merge pull request #1236 from giuseppe/correctly-recreate-request-partial-pulls
  • 75fd4d6 chunked: recalculate correctly the chunks to request
  • 90fd24c chunked: validate number of chunks received
  • 10d3891 Merge pull request #1235 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/kla...
  • 53c00fa build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.3 to 1.15.4
  • 3940c23 Merge pull request #1234 from giuseppe/overlay-idmapped-mounts-euid-not-0
  • 7aaa626 overlay: do not check for idmapped mounts if euid!=0
  • 52f9bbd Merge pull request #1233 from giuseppe/idmaps-create-layer-from-another-image...
  • 236b9ea store: skip template copy with layer in different store
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
